attributes.name: Blackjack Game
attributes.summary: The BlackjackGame class defines a comprehensive blackjack card game interface and logic within a card-based UI framework. It manages game state, player and dealer hands, betting, scoring, and game flow, providing interactive controls for placing bets, dealing cards, hitting, standing, and doubling down. The component handles the creation and shuffling of the card deck, card drawing, score calculations, blackjack and bust detection, dealer play automation, and game outcome determination. It also maintains persistent game data such as chips, bets, statistics, and hands, with a built-in editing interface for configuring casino and player information. The primary purpose is to deliver an engaging, interactive blackjack game experience with state management and visual presentation.
